heading: Prerequisites
body:
- To delete a project for an organization, you must either have the
  [Project Owner](<Project Owner>) role for the project or have the
  [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>) role for the project's organization.

- You must terminate any Atlas Services apps and/or MongoDB Charts instances.

- The project has no outstanding invoices.

- The project has no active clusters.
  [Terminate active clusters](terminate-cluster) or
  [Flex clusters](terminate-flex-cluster) in the project
  before you delete it.

- The project has no configured [private endpoint connections](private-endpoint).

- The project has no active [federated database instances](atlas-data-federation).
